urdu transliteration text: Teer ke aage mere, laal tujhe hona hai
english translation text: You have to be in front of the arrow my beloved son

urdu transliteration text: Dekh kar teri haseen zulm ne bhi rona hai
english translation text: Seeing your beauty, even the enemies will cry

urdu transliteration text: Jo tareeke hai laraeen ke sikhalun
english translation text: Let me teach you the ways of the battle

urdu transliteration text: Aaj ki raat tujhe godhi mein sulaloon mere asghar aaja
english translation text: Let me put you to sleep in my lap tonight, come my Asghar
